summary: Proposed infrastructural improvements included the 2-billion rail line from Marrakech to El Aain; a new fishing port at Ad-Dakhla, near Argoub in the Western Sahara; and a bridge-tunnel complex across the Strait of Gibraltar to link Morocco directly with Spain
key_points: Proposed infrastructural improvements included the 2-billion rail line from Marrakech to El Aain; a new fishing port at Ad-Dakhla, near Argoub in the Western Sahara; and a bridge-tunnel complex across the Strait of Gibraltar to link Morocco directly with Spain
